title: Protocol Database
author: Hardy, Barry
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The protocol database is a web-based protocol management system featuring: • Top navigation bar with two primary action buttons:          ❖ Protocols List: to view uploaded protocols. Visibility is based on the access level.          ❖ Document new protocol: to add a new protocol to the database. • Login section with fields for Email and Password, plus buttons to Log in or Set up an account. • Filter section with dropdown menus for:          ❖ Project          ❖ Organisation          ❖ Access level Along with Filter and Reset buttons to refine or clear search results. • A structured table containing all fields describing the protocols, the attached protocol documents, and the generated URLs.
steps_raw: The protocol database is a web-based protocol management system featuring: • Top navigation bar with two primary action buttons:          ❖ Protocols List: to view uploaded protocols. Visibility is based on the access level.          ❖ Document new protocol: to add a new protocol to the database. • Login section with fields for Email and Password, plus buttons to Log in or Set up an account. • Filter section with dropdown menus for:          ❖ Project          ❖ Organisation          ❖ Access level Along with Filter and Reset buttons to refine or clear search results. • A structured table containing all fields describing the protocols, the attached protocol documents, and the generated URLs.
